offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 client retainers/month, overspending causes cash flow gaps. We provide real-time budget monitoring instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Overspending on client projects without timely alerts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on budgeting tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting software
try_it: Let users try budget tracking dashboard and manual entry for 1-3 projects
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for projects
Allow CSV import for existing budget data
Enable one-click export of budget reports
